raw_excerpt_key_facts: Verbatim from the live fda.gov Advisory Committee Calendar page (fetched 2026-06-05 ~10:25 CT for cross-check): [Event Title] 'July 23-24, 2026: Meeting of the Pharmacy Compounding Advisory Committee'. [Date] 'July 23 - 24, 2026'. [Top-line Time] '8:00 a.m. - 3:50 p.m. ET' — day-unspecific. [Location] 'FDA, White Oak Campus, The Great Room, Building 31, Room 1503, 10903 New Hampshire Avenue, Silver Spring, MD 20903'. [Center] 'Center for Drug Evaluation and Research'. [Content current as of] '04/15/2026'. [Agenda verbatim — July 23] 'On July 23, 2026, the Committee will discuss the following bulk drug substances being considered for inclusion on the 503A Bulks List: BPC-157-related bulk drug substances (BPC-157 (free base)/ BPC-157 acetate), KPV-related bulk drug substances (KPV (free base)/ KPV acetate), TB-500-related bulk drug substances (TB-500 (free base)/ TB-500 acetate), and MOTs-C-related bulk drug substances (MOTs-C (free base)/ MOTs-C acetate).' [Table July 23] BPC-157 (free base) / BPC-157 acetate: Ulcerative colitis (UC); KPV (free base) / KPV acetate: Wound healing and inflammatory conditions; TB-500 (free base) / TB-500 acetate: Wound healing; MOTs-C (free base) / MOTs-C acetate: Obesity and osteoporosis. [Agenda verbatim — July 24] 'On July 24, 2026, the Committee will discuss the following bulk drug substances being considered for inclusion on the 503A Bulks List: Emideltide (also referred to as delta sleeping inducing peptide (DSIP))-related bulk drug substances (Emideltide (free base)/ Emideltide acetate), Semax-related bulk drug substances (Semax (free base)/ Semax acetate), and Epitalon-related bulk drug substances (Epitalon (free base)/ Epitalon acetate).' [Table July 24] Emideltide (free base) / Emideltide acetate: Opioid withdrawal, chronic insomnia, and narcolepsy; Semax (free base) / Semax acetate: Cerebral ischemia, migraine, and trigeminal neuralgia; Epitalon (free base) / Epitalon acetate: Insomnia. [Public Participation Information verbatim] 'FDA is establishing a docket for public comment on this meeting. The docket number is FDA-2025-N-6895. The docket will close on July 22, 2026.' [INSTRUCTIONS paragraph — contains the alleged typo] 'All submissions received must include the Docket No. FDA-2026-N-2979 for "Pharmacy Compounding Advisory Committee; Notice of Meeting; Establishment of a Public Docket; Request for Comments -- Bulk Drug Substances Nominated for Inclusion on the Section 503A Bulk Drug Substances List."' [Per-day oral session times — corroborates FR per-day specificity] 'Oral presentations from the public will begin at approximately 10:15 a.m., 11:50 a.m., 2:15 p.m., and 4:00 p.m. Eastern Time on July 23, 2026. Oral presentations from the public will begin at approximately 10:20 a.m., 12:30 p.m., and 3:20 p.m. Eastern Time on July 24, 2026.' [Contact verbatim] 'Takyiah Stevenson, PharmD, Center for Drug Evaluation and Research, Food and Drug Administration, 10903 New Hampshire Avenue, WO31-2417, Silver Spring, MD 20993-0002, Phone: 240-402-2507, Email: PCAC@fda.hhs.gov'.
diff_against_researcher_capture: No substantive differences. Researcher correctly captured: (a) top-line time 8am-3:50pm ET, (b) 7-peptide agenda, (c) the FDA-2026-N-2979 docket-number reference in the Instructions paragraph, (d) the FDA-2025-N-6895 docket reference in the Public Participation main paragraph. The Researcher did NOT explicitly capture the per-day oral session times (which are a third corroborator of the FR per-day specificity) — minor gap, not a substantive issue.
